title: I have learned to respect authority and to be mindful of what I say.
author: kichebar
selftext:
The account achieved a 26.48% year-to-date gain, thanks to both a structured sector allocation and disciplined management of cash and account consolidation. At this stage, maintaining discipline, managing drawdowns, and optimizing account structure will be key to the next phase             moving from $70K to $100K.

Investing is the result of strategy, discipline, and compound interest

comments.author: dogazine4570
comments.body: 26% ytd is solid, especially if you kept drawdowns under control. ngl the jump from 70k to 100k always feels slower than it should lol, but sticking to the plan usually beats trying to force it. just don’t get too confident after a good run, market humbles fast.

replies.author: kichebar
replies.body: *Exactly. Drawdown control matters more than the return itself. I keep telling myself not to get cocky  the market humbles everyone. Just sticking to the plan*
